Unlearning the Elephant: Against Multidisciplinarity

[caption id="" align=“alignnone” width=“2000”] Peng Wu and Yu Youyang, Irwin in the corporate meeting room , 2021. [/caption]

Essay “Unlearning the Elephant: Against Multidisciplinarity”, published in the MNArtist, the Walker Art Center. Illustrations by Peng Wu and Yu Youyang.
